layout.title: Milosz Misiek | Software Engineer
hero.bio.first: I am a software engineer based in Poland. I blend deep technical architecture with severe design restraint to build interfaces that feel deliberate, fast, and timeless.
hero.bio.second: Specializing in high-performance frontends, complex state management, and motion systems for teams that care about refined details.
